activity_summary: A customer success manager reviews renewal risk and decides save plan, executive escalation, or wait for usage evidence.
command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: Northstar Labs renewal review should request the procurement date before committing a save plan.

surface.heading: Renewal risk review

selected.request: Renewal risk review before the account planning meeting.

info.label: Usage trend
info.value: Down 28 percent over two reporting periods

evidence: Usage dropped 28 percent over the last two reporting periods.
Primary champion left the account last month.
Procurement timeline is missing before escalation.
surface.policy: Executive escalation is appropriate when sponsor risk and renewal timing are clear; missing procurement dates should be resolved before committing a save plan.

handoff.title: Renewal handoff
handoff.reason: Champion changed and usage dropped, but procurement timing is missing
handoff.action: Request the procurement date before committing the save plan
